tasks.label: Arduino: Derle + Yukle + Arayuz Ac
tasks.command: arduino-cli compile --fqbn arduino:avr:nano ${workspaceFolder} && arduino-cli upload -p /dev/cu.usbserial-130 --fqbn arduino:avr:nano ${workspaceFolder} && open ${workspaceFolder}/arayuz.html

tasks.label: Arduino: Sadece Derle ve Yukle
tasks.command: arduino-cli compile --fqbn arduino:avr:nano ${workspaceFolder} && arduino-cli upload -p /dev/cu.usbserial-130 --fqbn arduino:avr:nano ${workspaceFolder}
